name: Vetsource Veterinary Home Delivery Pharmacy API
what_it_does: Vetsource (Henry Schein Animal Health subsidiary) veterinary home delivery pharmacy REST API for prescription dispensing, medication compliance, and veterinary e-commerce for veterinary practices and pet owners. Enables AI agents to manage prescription authorization and medication order creation for veterinary pharmacy dispensing automation, handle home delivery and auto-ship enrollment for pet medication compliance automation, access prescription renewal reminder and compliance monitoring for patient adherence automation, retrieve medication pricing and generic alternative lookup for cost-effective prescribing automation, manage veterinary practice online pharmacy store for veterinary e-commerce automation, handle controlled substance DEA reporting for Schedule III-V veterinary prescription compliance automation, access product catalog and formulary management for practice pharmacy automation, retrieve customer order history and refill status for pharmacy relationship management automation, manage product recommendation and cross-sell for veterinary wellness commerce automation, and integrate Vetsource with veterinary practice management software and EHR for prescription-to-dispensing workflow automation.
use_cases: Filling pet prescriptions from veterinary pharmacy agents
Enrolling auto-ship from pet medication compliance agents
Renewing prescriptions from adherence monitoring agents
Managing practice pharmacy from e-commerce automation agents
not_for: Human pharmacy dispensing and retail pharmacy
best_when: A veterinary practice, animal hospital, or veterinary software platform wanting AI agents to automate prescription dispensing, home delivery enrollment, medication compliance monitoring, and online pharmacy management via Vetsource's veterinary home delivery pharmacy platform.
avoid_when: VETERINARIAN-CLIENT-PATIENT RELATIONSHIP (VCPR) REQUIREMENT FOR PRESCRIPTIONS: Automated prescription order processing via Vetsource requires valid VCPR between prescribing veterinarian and patient; automated prescription generation without confirmed VCPR creates DEA and state veterinary board violation. CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE DEA PRESCRIPTION REQUIREMENTS: Automated controlled substance (ketamine, tramadol, phenobarbital) prescription dispensing via Vetsource must comply with DEA Schedule III-V veterinary prescription requirements; automated dispensing without valid written DEA prescription for Schedule II-IV drugs creates DEA violation. FDA EXTRALABEL DRUG USE DOCUMENTATION: Automated prescription for extralabel drug use (using human drug for veterinary patient) must include prescribing veterinarian attestation of clinical justification; automated extralabel prescription without veterinarian attestation creates FDA Animal Medicinal Drug Use Clarification Act (AMDUCA) violation.

auth.notes: Vetsource uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Portland, Oregon HQ. Founded 2008. Acquired by Henry Schein Animal Health 2019. Part of Henry Schein ecosystem (NASDAQ: HSIC). Veterinary home delivery pharmacy serving 10,000+ veterinary practices. Auto-ship and medication compliance program. Practice online pharmacy store. PIMS integration (Cornerstone, AVImark, VetConnect). Home delivery for pet medications. Competes with Covetrus, Chewy Pharmacy, and Wedgewood Pharmacy for veterinary pharmacy.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — revenue share model for veterinary practices; patient pays prescription cost
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share from prescription fills for practice; practice online store setup included; no upfront cost to veterinary practice
pricing.notes: Portland OR (Henry Schein Animal Health). Revenue share model. No upfront cost to practices. Patient pays prescription and shipping. API access with active practice account.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; prescription and order queries throttled; webhooks for order and refill events

known_agent_gotchas: VCPR VALIDATION BEFORE PRESCRIPTION GENERATION: Automated prescription order processing must confirm valid Veterinarian-Client-Patient Relationship for the prescribing veterinarian, pet owner, and patient; automated prescription for new patients without confirmed VCPR creates DEA and state board violation; implement VCPR date and examination record check before prescription automation

CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE PRESCRIPTION FORM REQUIREMENTS: Automated Vetsource controlled substance (Schedule III-V) prescription must include DEA-required elements (veterinarian DEA number, patient species, drug name/quantity/strength, valid dates); automated CS prescription with missing required fields creates DEA violation and prescription rejection

AUTO-SHIP CANCELLATION FOR DISCONTINUED MEDICATIONS: Automated medication auto-ship enrollment must implement discontinued medication cancellation trigger; veterinary medication changes (dose adjustment, medication switch, patient death) must cancel auto-ship; automated auto-ship without cancellation trigger creates unwanted refill and patient safety risk

HENRY SCHEIN ECOSYSTEM INTEGRATION SCOPE: Vetsource is Henry Schein Animal Health subsidiary; automated workflows integrating Vetsource pharmacy with Henry Schein practice management tools benefit from Henry Schein unified ecosystem; verify Henry Schein Vetsource API integration scope vs standalone Vetsource API for practice integration

GENERIC SUBSTITUTION VETERINARIAN AUTHORIZATION: Automated generic alternative suggestion for brand-name veterinary prescriptions must include veterinarian approval for substitution; automated generic dispensing without prescriber authorization for 'dispense as written' prescriptions creates pharmacy dispensing protocol violation

PRESCRIPTION EXPIRATION DATE ENFORCEMENT: Vetsource prescription processing enforces prescription expiration dates (typically 1 year, 6 months for controlled substances); automated prescription refill must check prescription validity date; automated refill against expired prescription creates pharmacy dispensing error
agent_readiness.security_notes: Veterinary pharmacy. SOC2, DEA. OAuth2. US. Veterinary patient records, prescription data, and controlled substance dispensing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Veterinary pharmacy. SOC2, DEA. OAuth2. US. Prescription, controlled substance, and patient medication data.
